name: FargateProfile
description: FargateProfile schema from Amazon EKS API

fargateProfileName.description: The name of the Fargate profile.

fargateProfileArn.description: The full Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Fargate profile.

clusterName.description: The name of the cluster the Fargate profile is associated with.

status.description: The current status of the Fargate profile.

podExecutionRoleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the pod execution role.

subnets.description: The IDs of subnets to launch pods into.

selectors.description: The selectors to match for pods to use this Fargate profile.

tags.description: Metadata that assists with categorization and organization.

createdAt.description: The Unix epoch timestamp at object creation.
